subcodes.first_line: O Candle of Guidance! The guidance of love is the Beauty of Divine Unity. Praise be to God, its lamp is illumined within thy heart, and His grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع هدایت هدایت محبت جمال احدیت است الحمد لله سراجش در قلبت روشن و موهبت
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @exhortations and counsels, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement
